title: assessment-state.json
description: Skill-owned resumability ledger for vercel-to-aws. Tracks inputs received (by tier), per-finding confidence with its computed_from_inputs dependency set, Clarify answers with prompt + design_consequence, and a capped report_history. Independent of .phase-status.json - see SKILL.md 'State Management'. This schema has no canonical source elsewhere in the plugin; it is NOT part of references/vendored/ and is NOT synced by mise run shared:sync.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this file's shape. Bump on breaking changes.

migration_id.description: Matches the $MIGRATION_DIR folder name (e.g. 0315-1030). Set at creation; never changes. Same value as .phase-status.json's migration_id for the same run.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; updated after each write to this file.

inputs_received.description: Which Startup Input Manifest inputs have been received, by tier. Keys within each tier map are input names (e.g. 'log_drain_export', 'vercel_api_token'); this schema does not enumerate them - the valid names are whatever the skill's PreScan/Discover phases declare.

findings.description: Every finding this skill has computed, keyed by a stable finding_id (e.g. 'preflight.M1', 'coupling.isr', 'discovery.traffic_shape', 'recommend.fired_rule'). Drives selective recompute on a warm re-entry (see computed_from_inputs).

clarify_answers.description: Every Clarify answer recorded so far, keyed by question id (e.g. 'Q1_traffic_shape', 'Q4_preview_dependence'). Feeds the report's decision-traceability appendix.

report_history.description: One entry per successful report write, most-recent last. Capped at 5 entries (FIFO eviction - report-assemble.md drops index 0 before appending past the cap). Requirement 11.4 only needs a diff against the immediately prior entry.

received.description: Whether this input has been supplied as of the last PreScan/Discover run.

received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this input was first detected as received. Null if not yet received.

value.description: The finding's actual value/content. Shape varies by finding_id (a Pre-Flight Check finding, a Coupling Score item, a discovery fact) - this schema does not constrain it.

confidence.description: Per Requirement 4.4: LOW when resting solely on header probes or coarse usage aggregates; HIGH is only eligible when backed by log-drain or invoice data.

upgrade_input.description: The specific missing input that would upgrade this finding's confidence, per Requirement 4.5. Null only when confidence is already HIGH.

computed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent computation. Unchanged across a warm re-entry where this finding was short-circuited (see computed_from_inputs).

computed_from_inputs.description: Input keys (matching inputs_received leaf keys across all tiers) this finding's value depends on. On a warm re-entry, a fragment recomputes a finding ONLY if this list intersects the newly_received set (see SKILL.md 'Assessment State Management' step 2); otherwise the finding's value/confidence/computed_at carry forward unchanged.

prompt.description: The exact question text presented to the founder.

design_consequence.description: What downstream decision this answer feeds, e.g. 'feeds recommend phase rule 1 (preview-dependence check)'. May state 'not yet determined - feeds recommend phase rule N' when the consequence depends on a rule that has not run yet at Clarify time (per clarify's postconditions).

recommendation_snapshot.description: A copy of recommendation.json as it existed at the time this report was generated.

diff_from_previous.description: Null on the first report_history entry (nothing to diff against). On subsequent entries, the list of findings that changed confidence or value since the immediately prior entry, per Requirement 11.4.
